note: All queries via Grafana datasource proxy /monitoring/api/datasources/proxy/uid/prometheus-uid/api/v1/*

up.note: Only monitoring-environment targets: loki:3100, localhost:9090, grafana:3000. All environment=monitoring. No staging or prod targets from direct scrape.

up_environment_staging.note: All staging targets are vm=ap-vm only. No db-vm targets present.

up_environment_prod.note: Zero prod-environment targets. No prod Alloy is pushing to this Prometheus.

note_no_db_vm: Only ap-vm exists. DB-VM metrics (postgres-exporter, node-exporter on db) not arriving.

rules_endpoint.note: Empty groups — rule_files are commented out in prometheus.yml. All alert and recording rules are disabled.

runtimeinfo_endpoint.note: Grafana datasource proxy does not forward /api/v1/runtimeinfo — admin API not proxied.

pg_stat_activity_count.note: Zero results. postgres-exporter not present in Prometheus (no db-vm scrape).

http_errors_total_backend.note: Metric http_errors_total does not exist in Prometheus TSDB.

http_request_duration_seconds_bucket_bac.note: Exists and has data. Backend latency histogram works.

db_query_duration_seconds_bucket_backend.note: Metric db_query_duration_seconds_bucket does not exist in Prometheus TSDB.

postgres_exporter_metrics.note: Only postgres_exporter_config_last_reload_success_timestamp_seconds and postgres_exporter_config_last_reload_successful present. No pg_stat_activity_count, no pg_stat_statements_*, no pg_up.
